agents.name: Rex
agents.note: Session 200 (Rex) -- crash-recovery iteration for US-337 (Sprint 35 / V0.27.9, single story: redo US-331's MSYS path-mangle fix that false-passed I-031). Prior session shipped the code (makeMsysSafePath() + TestScanPiRowsSurvivesGitBashMsysMangle real-subprocess class) but left sprint.json/agents/progress un-updated. This session: (1) verified pre-flight rules out I-032 hypothesis (c) and traced the mangle to Git for Windows ssh.exe's MSYS argv substring re-parser (env vars are not honoured by that fork); (2) empirically proved the RED invariant by bypassing makeMsysSafePath() in scanPiRows line 560 -> the regression test raised the byte-identical 'C:/Program Files/Git/home/.../obd.db' BackfillError; restored the fix and the test goes green; (3) ran all 6 verification commands from sprint.json -- test_backfill_deploy_contexts.py 28/28 green, scripts+server suite 1127/1127 green, ruff clean, bash -n clean, sprint_lint 0 errors / 0 warnings. The full-suite ralph.sh promise-tag failure is the PRE-EXISTING one called out in testBaseline.note (in-flight uncommitted ralph.sh edit). US-337 passes:true. Sprint 35 COMPLETE -- 1/1 stories shipped; real-world gate (bash deploy/deploy-server.sh from Windows Git-Bash post-V0.27.9 -> rows 11-15 populated) is PM/CIO-side IRL validation per the V0.27 chain-end-merge framing.
